summary: Carrier-only spec closeout accepts CORE-244 terminal metadata and idle pointer sync after PR #249 merged and #243/#244/#245/#246/#247/#248 closed.
reviewed_validation_summary: loom fact-chain --target . --json; loom verify --target . --json; git diff --check passed locally before CORE-244 current pointer retire PR.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec is limited to Core refs-only task submission, Lode asset resolution, Harbor local runtime API consumption, admission/failure Run Record writes, and evidence/runtime ref queryability. App UI, Harbor/Lode code, live browser/account/profile/Cookie/production page operation, true write/submit, hosted browser, marketplace, bulk collection, account cloud hosting, and risk-bypass claims remain out of scope.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The plan maps submit/admission, Lode asset resolution, Harbor readiness/provider/session/snapshot/evidence calls, fail-closed behavior, and no-private-material boundaries to focused API/Core self-checks and Loom evidence.
